faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most popular questions about our services

items.q: How is the moving cost calculated?
items.a: Cost depends on the volume of items, distance, floor level, and selected services. Use our calculator for a preliminary estimate.
Yes, we bear 100% material liability for cargo. Every move is documented with an acceptance act.

items.q: How far in advance should I book?
items.a: We recommend booking 3-7 days in advance. During peak season (May-September) — 1-2 weeks.

items.q: Do you work on weekends and holidays?
items.a: Yes, we work 7 days a week, 24 hours a day. No surcharges for weekends or holidays.

items.q: How does the moving process work?
items.a: 1) Request → 2) Free estimator visit → 3) Fixed price in contract → 4) Moving day → 5) Completion act.
